Service Hub

Mantels by Timber & Testament

Custom fireplace mantel design and installation. Custom mantels establish a strong focal point around fireplaces with proportion-aware design, code-conscious spacing, and finish details aligned with surrounding trim and cabinetry.

Where Mantels Adds Value

Mantels is commonly used in living rooms, great rooms, dens where homeowners need better function and stronger finish quality.

  • fireplace wall refreshes
  • new construction focal points
  • beam-style mantel upgrades

Benefits and Materials

Key benefits include defined focal point, better room proportion, cohesive finish quality. Material selection often includes alder, oak, maple, engineered beam cores based on wear expectations and visual goals.

Typical process sequence: clearance review, mounting reinforcement, mantel fitting, finish touch-up.

FAQ: Mantels

Can mantels be matched to existing trim and finishes?

Yes. We review existing profiles and finish direction to align new work with your home where practical.
